case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. JENNICA LEON

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, JENNICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHEILA ROBLERO--SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.50) SERVED NOV-01-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, JENNICA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, JENNICA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-07-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL SIX MONTHS. DEFENDANT HAS AGREED TO PAY $50.00 EVERY TWO WEEKS BEGINNING JANUARY 18TH, 2013 PLUS THE $50.00 ADMINISTRATION FEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, JENNICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
